  "rationale": "811/CGA best practices define a tolerance zone (typically 18-24 inches from the outer edge of a marked utility) where only non-mechanical excavation methods such as hand digging or vacuum excavation are permitted. Mechanical digging inside this zone is non-compliant and poses a high risk of utility strike, making the correct decision a fail.",
